name: Silver Star Properties REIT, Inc.
description: Silver Star Properties REIT, Inc. is a self-managed real estate investment trust that has owned and operated commercial office, retail, flex, and industrial properties since 1983. Headquartered in the United States, the company focuses on acquiring, developing, and owning a diverse portfolio of commercial real estate assets. Recently, the firm has shifted its strategic investment focus toward the self-storage asset class, seeking to acquire properties that offer value-add opportunities. The company is committed to providing premium commercial space at competitive rates while maintaining high-quality amenities and services for its tenants across its various property holdings.
